title: VBU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Assistant Posts
description: The Visva Bharati University (VBU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation and Ph.D. can apply for the VBU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application...
